KO

Office Hours

Schedule a 25-minute office hour session.

Students may reserve an available meeting time through the Google Calendar booking page.

Please provide your name, email, contact number, and student ID when making a reservation.

Book Office Hours

The booking page will open in a new window.

Reservation Guidelines

  1. Each advising session is 25 minutes.
  2. Please book only one time slot unless otherwise instructed.
  3. A confirmation email will be sent after booking.
  4. Appointment changes or cancellations should be made through the confirmation email.
  5. Please arrive on time for your scheduled session.

Department of Civil Engineering, Jeonbuk National University

567, Baekje-daero, Deokjin-gu, Jeonju-si, Jeonbuk-do, Republic of Korea

Tel: +82-63-270-2430
